{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324005430CD5213CBFE7ADCE8FD33"}"},"total":57},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615019751921386264","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的超级温馨 读起来心头暖暖的","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":12,"text":"暖暖","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9A%96%E6%9A%96&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774284870DCE8FD33%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227615019751921386264%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227570686734808124440%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9A%96%E6%9A%96%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773017260,"group_id":"7570686734808124440","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N98zjkZImksTrPVN70xKj50gbczBiIgJchRjqvc119kV","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1957593537850340","user_name":"重生之今年四岁了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1957593537850340","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7570686734808124440","book_info":{"abstract":"[架空+种田+采摘+狩猎+日常生活+无极品+单女主+……]
一睁眼，生长在红旗下的苏长安穿成了古代山村里的痴傻少年。
家徒四壁，至亲卷款跑路，还留了一屁股还不清的烂债。
看着被退婚的大姐、胆小的妹妹、顽劣的弟弟，他叹了口气，激活了脑中的【古今知识库】。
深山的臭叶子，被他做成千金难求的神仙豆腐；
驱蚊的野草，在他手里变成日进斗金的盘香；
人人都嫌的白蜡虫，他炼出了价比白银的明烛……
他本想靠着“知识”勉强养家，种种田，做点小买卖。
可不知不觉——
被退婚的大姐，成了御口亲赞的天下名厨；
胆小怯懦的妹妹，成了宫廷一绣难求的大家；
整天捣蛋的堂弟，其手造机关竟被奉为墨家遗宝……
多年后，大禹朝国富兵强，粮仓满溢，而他，仍只是个山间布衣。
史官为其作传，终掷笔慨叹：
“先生一生未曾入朝，然其犁、其种、其器、其法，已为万世开太平。此乃，真‘山间宰相’也。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ee6c5e3c4a7cc80c2a9cd16ceddd0e41","author":"粘锅上的咸鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7570686734808124440","book_name":"农门长孙：靠采摘狩猎带全家逆袭","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#305040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7590347586771354136","read_count":"42860","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"553257"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"158","tags":"历史古代,乡村,历史,穿越,单女主,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f8f16b914e427339766a9b9a069f3efb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779468871&x-signature=7xeleqWy97TSHQZN40Gpam8jXoU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"211566233388591","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"124"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324005430CD5213CBFE7ADCE8FD33"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"f
